name: libnvidia-tesla-535-pkcs11-openssl3
title: libnvidia-tesla-535-pkcs11-openssl3
description:
NVIDIA PKCS #11 Library (OpenSSL 3) (Tesla 535 version)
The Compute Unified Device Architecture (CUDA) enables NVIDIA
graphics processing units (GPUs) to be used for massively parallel
general purpose computation.
.
This package contains the NVIDIA PKCS #11 library with OpenSSL 3 backend.
